stemHtml: Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) are widely used in commercial aviation. Which of the following is the biggest potential threat when they are used?

options.a: SOPs promote violations and reduce the margin of safety.
options.b: Misunderstandings can result if pilots change to a new employer.
options.c: SOPs increase pilot workload in non-standard operating conditions.
options.d: SOPs may poorly fit the aircraft type or the actual operator’s type of operation and reduce the margin of safety.
